params.did: keccak256 hash of the agent's DID string
params.wallet: EVM wallet address of the agent

returns.agentId: The newly assigned agent ID (starts from 1)

getAgent(uint256).notice: Get full agent record by ID

getAgentIdByDID(bytes32).notice: Look up agent ID by DID hash (returns 0 if not registered)

getAgentIdByWallet(address).notice: Look up agent ID by wallet address (returns 0 if not registered)

isActive(uint256).notice: Check whether an agent is currently active

owner().notice: Owner of the registry (can suspend agents, update score)

registerAgent(address,bytes32,string).notice: Register a new agent in the registry

suspendAgent(uint256).notice: Suspend an agent (e.g. detected malicious behaviour)

updateMetadata(uint256,string).notice: Update the metadata URI for an agent

updateScore(uint256,uint256).notice: Update the reputation score for an agent
